ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organization */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the organization */,
  "last_trans_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "last_year" INTEGER /* Last year of operation */,
  "total_exchanges" INTEGER /* Total number of time exchanges made by the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the organization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the organization is based */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* A brief description of the organization's mission */,
  "vision_statement" TEXT /* A brief description of the organization's vision */,
  "values" TEXT /* Core values of the organization */,
  "total_hours_given" REAL /* Total hours of service given by the organization */,
  "total_hours_received" REAL /* Total hours of service received by the organization */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the organization based on member feedback */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given to the organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the organization's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the member belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the organization */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the member was last active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the member */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "total_hours_given" REAL /* Total hours of service given by the member */,
  "total_hours_received" REAL /* Total hours of service received by the member */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the member based on service feedback */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given to the member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the member is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the transaction occurred in */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who performed the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provided */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who received the service */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent on the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the transaction occurred */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the receiver of the service */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the receiver of the service (1-5) */,
  "is_scheduled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transaction was scheduled in advance */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was scheduled */,
  "actual_start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the service */,
  "actual_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transaction's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the service belongs to */,
  "estimated_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration of the service in hours */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated cost of the service if it were paid for with money */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the service is popular */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the service's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical management */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category's icon */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the category's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the location's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is public */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member, guest) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., transaction completed, new report available) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the notification's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
